ingredients.name: Sausage
ingredients.use: Crumbled into the egg scramble filling
ingredients.prep: Brown in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking into crumbles. Drain grease before mixing with eggs.

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.use: Scrambled into the burrito filling
ingredients.prep: Crack into a bowl, whisk, season with salt & pepper. Cook in the same pan as sausage over medium-low heat.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 1 dozen (keep 1 dozen separate for French Toast)

ingredients.name: Tortilla Shells
ingredients.use: Burrito wraps — use the large flour tortillas
ingredients.prep: Warm on a dry skillet for 30 seconds per side or microwave wrapped in a damp paper towel for 30s.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~10 tortillas for burritos (10 remaining for Tacos)

ingredients.name: White Onion
ingredients.use: Sautéed into the burrito filling for flavor
ingredients.prep: Dice finely. Sauté in oil over medium heat until translucent, ~5 min, before adding sausage.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~½ onion diced for burritos

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers
ingredients.use: Sautéed into the egg filling for color and crunch
ingredients.prep: Slice into thin strips or dice. Sauté with onion over medium heat until softened, ~5–7 min.

ingredients.name: Monterey Jack Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Melted on top of the filling inside the burrito
ingredients.prep: Lay slices over hot filling before rolling. The residual heat will melt it.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~½ pack for burritos (½ pack reserved for Tacos)

ingredients.name: Hashbrowns
ingredients.use: Served as a side dish alongside the burritos
ingredients.prep: Cook from frozen on a greased skillet over medium-high heat, ~4–5 min per side until golden and crispy. Season with salt.

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.use: Sliced and dipped in egg custard, then pan-fried
ingredients.prep: Use thick-cut slices (~¾ inch). Stale bread works best — soak each slice in custard for 20–30 sec per side.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 1 loaf for French Toast (separate loaves bought for Sandwiches)

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.use: Combined with milk to make the custard dip
ingredients.prep: Whisk eggs with a splash of milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt. Pour into a shallow dish for dipping.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~6 eggs for French Toast custard (6 eggs reserved for Breakfast Burritos)

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.use: Scrambled or fried to order for the whole group
ingredients.prep: For scrambled: whisk with a splash of milk, cook over medium-low heat stirring slowly. For fried: crack directly into a buttered pan over low heat.

ingredients.name: Bacon
ingredients.use: Served alongside eggs and toast
ingredients.prep: Lay flat in a cold pan, heat to medium. Cook ~4 min per side until crispy. Drain on paper towels. Or bake at 400°F for 18–20 min on a sheet pan.

ingredients.name: Sausage Links
ingredients.use: Served alongside eggs and toast as an alternative to bacon
ingredients.prep: Cook in a skillet over medium heat, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides and cooked through (~10–12 min). Internal temp should reach 160°F.

ingredients.name: Bread (for toast)
ingredients.use: Toasted to serve alongside the eggs and meat
ingredients.prep: Toast in a toaster or on a griddle with butter until golden. Serve with butter and jam if available.

ingredients.name: Cinnamon Rolls
ingredients.use: Baked and served as the sweet side dish
ingredients.prep: Preheat oven to 350°F (or as labeled). Place rolls in a greased pan with space between. Bake 12–15 min until golden. Drizzle included icing while warm.

ingredients.name: Pancake Mix
ingredients.use: Batter base for the pancakes
ingredients.prep: Follow box instructions — typically 1 cup mix + ¾ cup water. Don't over-mix; lumps are fine. Cook on a greased griddle over medium heat until bubbles form (~2 min), then flip.

ingredients.name: Frozen Waffles
ingredients.use: Toaster waffles served alongside pancakes for variety
ingredients.prep: Toast from frozen in a toaster or toaster oven until golden and crispy, ~2 cycles. Serve immediately with syrup and fruit.

ingredients.name: Fruit (mixed)
ingredients.use: Fresh fruit served as the side with pancakes and waffles
ingredients.prep: Wash and slice as needed. No cooking required. Serve cold.

ingredients.name: Maple Syrup
ingredients.use: Topping for pancakes and waffles
ingredients.prep: Serve at room temp or warm briefly in a small saucepan. Set bottles on the table.

ingredients.name: Croissants
ingredients.use: The bread base for the sandwiches — slice and fill
ingredients.prep: Slice horizontally. Optional: warm in oven at 300°F for 3–5 min for a crispy exterior. Layer with ham, cheese, and mustard/mayo.

ingredients.name: Ham
ingredients.use: The main protein filling for the croissant sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Serve cold from the pack or warm briefly in a skillet over medium heat until edges curl slightly.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 2 packs for croissant sandwiches (separate packs bought for Sandwiches)

ingredients.name: Cheddar Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Cheese layer in the croissant sandwich
ingredients.prep: Serve cold or let sit at room temp for 10 min for better flavor. Lay 1–2 slices on each sandwich.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~½ pack for croissant sandwiches (½ pack reserved for Burgers)

ingredients.name: Fruit (mixed)
ingredients.use: Fresh fruit side dish alongside the sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Wash and slice as needed. Serve cold.

ingredients.name: Hamburger
ingredients.use: Seasoned ground beef taco filling
ingredients.prep: Brown in a skillet over medium-high heat, drain fat. Add taco seasoning with 1/4 cup water, simmer 5 min until thickened.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 3 lbs for tacos (separate 3 lbs bought for Burgers)

ingredients.name: Taco Shells
ingredients.use: Hard shell option for tacos
ingredients.prep: Warm in oven at 350°F for 3–5 min on a baking sheet. Stand upright in a baking dish to keep them from tipping.

ingredients.name: Tortilla Shells
ingredients.use: Soft shell option for tacos
ingredients.prep: Warm on a dry skillet 30 sec per side or microwave in a stack wrapped in a damp paper towel for 30s.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~10 tortillas for tacos (10 tortillas used for Breakfast Burritos)

ingredients.name: Monterey Jack Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Cheese topping for tacos
ingredients.prep: Shred or tear slices into smaller pieces. Add directly to assembled tacos.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~½ pack for tacos (½ pack used in Breakfast Burritos)

ingredients.name: Sour Cream
ingredients.use: Cooling topping dolloped on finished tacos
ingredients.prep: Serve chilled straight from the container. Set out with a spoon for self-serve.

ingredients.name: Taco Sauce
ingredients.use: Sauce/condiment — mild, medium, and hot options for the table
ingredients.prep: Serve at room temp. Set all bottles out so everyone can pick their heat level.

ingredients.name: Shredded Lettuce
ingredients.use: Topping layer in tacos for crunch
ingredients.prep: No prep needed — bags come pre-shredded. Keep refrigerated until serving.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 1 bag for tacos (1 bag reserved for Burgers)

ingredients.name: Tomato (whole, raw)
ingredients.use: Diced fresh tomato topping for tacos
ingredients.prep: Dice into small cubes. Salt lightly and let sit 5 min to draw out juice, then drain before serving.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~1 lb diced for tacos (1 lb reserved for Burgers)

ingredients.name: White Onion
ingredients.use: Raw diced onion topping for tacos
ingredients.prep: Dice finely. Serve raw as a topping. Optional: soak diced onion in cold water for 10 min to mellow sharpness.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~½ onion for tacos

ingredients.name: Steak
ingredients.use: Main protein — one steak per person
ingredients.prep: Salt generously 30–60 min ahead. Grill or pan-sear over very high heat, ~3–4 min per side for medium-rare (130°F internal). Rest 5 min before cutting. Finish with a pat of butter.

ingredients.name: Potato (whole, raw)
ingredients.use: Boiled and mashed into the side dish
ingredients.prep: Peel and cube into 1-inch pieces. Boil in salted water ~15–20 min until fork-tender. Drain, mash with butter and warm milk. Season with salt and pepper.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.use: Mixed into mashed potatoes + used to baste and finish steaks
ingredients.prep: 1 stick into hot mash while still warm. Use remaining butter to baste steaks in the pan during the last 1–2 min of cooking.

ingredients.name: Milk
ingredients.use: Warmed and stirred into mashed potatoes for creaminess
ingredients.prep: Warm in a small saucepan or microwave (don't boil). Add gradually while mashing to reach your desired consistency.

ingredients.name: Hamburger
ingredients.use: Formed into patties — the main protein
ingredients.prep: Form into 7 patties (~6–7 oz each). Season both sides with salt and pepper. Grill or pan-cook over high heat, ~3–4 min per side for medium. Don't press down with a spatula.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 3 lbs for burgers (separate 3 lbs bought for Tacos)

ingredients.name: Hamburger Buns
ingredients.use: Bun for each burger — toast for best results
ingredients.prep: Toast cut-side down on the grill or skillet with a little butter for ~1 min until golden.

ingredients.name: Pickles
ingredients.use: Classic burger topping — serve from the jar
ingredients.prep: Drain jar before serving. Set out with tongs or a fork for self-serve.

ingredients.name: Tomato (whole, raw)
ingredients.use: Sliced tomato topping for burgers
ingredients.prep: Slice into 1/4-inch rounds. Lay flat on a plate for self-serve.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~1 lb sliced for burgers (1 lb diced for Tacos)

ingredients.name: Shredded Lettuce
ingredients.use: Topping layer for burgers
ingredients.prep: No prep needed — bags come pre-shredded.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 1 bag for burgers (1 bag for Tacos)

ingredients.name: Ketchup & Mustard
ingredients.use: Classic condiments for the burger bar
ingredients.prep: Set out on the table at room temperature.

ingredients.name: White Onion
ingredients.use: Sliced raw for the burger bar
ingredients.prep: Slice into thin rounds. Serve raw. For caramelized onions: cook in butter over low heat for 25-30 min stirring occasionally.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~1/2 onion sliced for burgers

ingredients.name: Pepperjack Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Spicy cheese option for burgers — melted on the patty
ingredients.prep: Lay a slice on the patty 1 min before it comes off the heat. Cover pan/grill briefly to melt.

ingredients.name: Cheddar Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Classic cheese option for burgers — melted on the patty
ingredients.prep: Lay a slice on the patty 1 min before it comes off heat. Cover briefly to melt.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~1/2 pack for burgers (1/2 pack used in Croissant Sandwiches)

ingredients.name: American Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Meltiest cheese option for burgers
ingredients.prep: Add to patty in the last minute of cooking. American melts the best of the three — great for a classic smash-style burger.

ingredients.name: Frozen Fries
ingredients.use: Baked fries served alongside the burgers
ingredients.prep: Preheat oven to 425F. Spread fries in a single layer on a baking sheet. Bake 20-25 min, flipping halfway. Season with salt immediately out of the oven.

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.use: The bread for grilled cheese — 2 slices per sandwich
ingredients.prep: Use standard sandwich slices. Butter one side of each slice generously before placing butter-side-down in the pan.

ingredients.name: Cheddar Cheese (sliced)
ingredients.use: Main cheese filling — layer 2-3 slices per sandwich
ingredients.prep: Stack slices in the center of bread. Cook on medium-low heat — low and slow ensures the cheese fully melts before the bread burns (~3-4 min per side).

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.use: Spread on the outside of each bread slice for the golden crust
ingredients.prep: Soften to room temp for easy spreading. Coat the outer faces evenly. Cook in a pan over medium-low heat until deep golden.

ingredients.name: Tomato Soup
ingredients.use: Served as the dipping side alongside the sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Empty cans into a large pot. Add equal part milk (or water) and stir. Heat over medium, stirring frequently, until steaming. Do not boil.

ingredients.name: Breaded Chicken Cutlets
ingredients.use: The main protein — bake, then top with sauce and cheese
ingredients.prep: Bake at 400F for 20-25 min until internal temp hits 165F and breading is golden. Top with marinara and a sprinkle of parm in the last 5 min of baking.

ingredients.name: Penne Noodles
ingredients.use: The pasta base served under or alongside the chicken
ingredients.prep: Boil in well-salted water for ~10-12 min until al dente. Drain, toss with a ladleful of marinara to coat.

ingredients.name: Marinara Sauce
ingredients.use: Poured over the baked chicken and mixed with penne
ingredients.prep: Warm in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Spoon over chicken in the last 5 min of baking and toss with pasta.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 2 jars for Chicken Parm (2 separate jars bought for Spaghetti)

ingredients.name: Parmesan Cheese
ingredients.use: Sprinkled over the chicken and pasta to finish
ingredients.prep: Sprinkle generously over the top right before serving. Also set the container on the table for extra.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~1/2 container for Chicken Parm (1/2 container for Spaghetti)

ingredients.name: Spaghetti Noodles
ingredients.use: The pasta base — make a big pot for the whole group
ingredients.prep: Boil in heavily salted water for ~9-11 min until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining — helps loosen sauce. Toss with marinara or butter immediately.

ingredients.name: Marinara Sauce
ingredients.use: The red sauce option for the spaghetti
ingredients.prep: Warm in a pot over medium heat. Add reserved pasta water a splash at a time if too thick. Toss with drained pasta.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 2 jars for Spaghetti (2 separate jars bought for Chicken Parm)

ingredients.name: Meat Balls
ingredients.use: Protein addition on top of or alongside the spaghetti
ingredients.prep: Add frozen meatballs directly to simmering marinara sauce and heat through, ~15-20 min. Or microwave in a covered dish with a splash of water for 5-7 min.

ingredients.name: Garlic Bread
ingredients.use: The side dish served alongside the pasta
ingredients.prep: Bake from frozen at 375F for 8-10 min (wrapped in foil), then open foil for last 2-3 min to crisp up. Watch it — it burns fast.

ingredients.name: Parmesan Cheese
ingredients.use: Finishing cheese sprinkled over the pasta at the table
ingredients.prep: Set the container on the table for self-serve. No prep needed.
ingredients.mealQuantity: ~1/2 container for Spaghetti (1/2 container for Chicken Parm)

ingredients.name: Chicken Nuggets
ingredients.use: Late night snack — cook a batch whenever people get hungry
ingredients.prep: Bake at 400F for 12-15 min on a baking sheet, flipping once. Or air fry at 400F for 8-10 min. Serve with ketchup, ranch, or buffalo sauce.

ingredients.name: Pizzas
ingredients.use: Personal-sized pizzas for late night — one per person
ingredients.prep: Bake directly on the oven rack at 400F for 14-17 min until crust is crispy and cheese is bubbly. Let cool 2 min before cutting.

ingredients.name: Pizza Rolls
ingredients.use: Shareable late night snack — cook a bag at a time
ingredients.prep: Bake at 425F for 13-15 min until golden. Let sit 2 min before eating — filling is extremely hot. Or microwave on a plate for 1:15, flip, then 1:15 more.

ingredients.name: Fish Sticks
ingredients.use: An extra late night option for fish stick fans
ingredients.prep: Bake at 425F for 15-17 min, flipping once. Serve with tartar sauce or ketchup.

ingredients.name: Corndogs
ingredients.use: Late night crowd-pleaser — heat and serve
ingredients.prep: Bake at 375F for 16-18 min, turning once. Or microwave individually for 60-90 sec. Serve with mustard and ketchup.

ingredients.name: Hawaiian Rolls
ingredients.use: The slider buns — soft and slightly sweet, perfect for pulled chicken
ingredients.prep: Slice the whole slab of rolls horizontally without separating. Layer filling, then replace top. Optionally brush with butter and bake at 350F for 5-8 min to warm through.

ingredients.name: Pulled Chicken
ingredients.use: The main protein filling — split into buffalo and BBQ batches
ingredients.prep: Heat in a pan over medium heat. Split into two portions: toss half with buffalo sauce, half with BBQ sauce. Simmer 2-3 min until coated and heated through.

ingredients.name: Buffalo Sauce
ingredients.use: Tossed with half the pulled chicken for the buffalo batch
ingredients.prep: Mix into warm chicken in a pan or bowl. Use as much or as little as you want — taste as you go for heat level.

ingredients.name: BBQ Sauce
ingredients.use: Tossed with the other half of chicken for the BBQ batch
ingredients.prep: Mix into warm chicken in a pan. Simmer over medium heat for 2-3 min until sauce thickens slightly and coats the chicken.

ingredients.name: Cheese
ingredients.use: Melted over the assembled sliders before serving
ingredients.prep: Lay slices over filled sliders. If baking to warm: the cheese melts during the 5-8 min in the oven. Otherwise microwave assembled sliders for 30 sec.

ingredients.name: Bread
ingredients.use: The base for hiking sandwiches — make ahead the morning of
ingredients.prep: Lay out all slices assembly-line style. Spread condiments first, then layer meat and cheese. Wrap individual sandwiches in foil or plastic wrap and refrigerate until packing.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 4 loaves for sandwiches (separate loaf bought for French Toast)

ingredients.name: Ham
ingredients.use: Main deli meat option for the hiking sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Layer 2-3 slices per sandwich. Keep refrigerated until packing. Pack sandwiches in a cooler for the hike.
ingredients.mealQuantity: 3 packs for hiking sandwiches (separate 2 packs bought for Croissant Sandwiches)

ingredients.name: Turkey
ingredients.use: Second deli meat option for variety in the hiking sandwiches
ingredients.prep: Layer 2-3 slices per sandwich alongside or instead of ham.

ingredients.name: Mustard & Mayo
ingredients.use: Condiments spread on the sandwiches before assembly
ingredients.prep: Spread on both inner faces of bread. Mustard on one side, mayo on the other is classic.

ingredients.name: Marshmallows
ingredients.use: Toasted over the campfire — the star of the s'more
ingredients.prep: Skewer on a roasting stick. Hold over embers (not flames) rotating slowly for even browning. Pull away when golden and puffed. For the brave: light it on fire briefly then blow out.

ingredients.name: Hershey's Chocolate Bars
ingredients.use: The chocolate layer — 1-2 squares per s'more
ingredients.prep: Break bars into individual squares ahead of time. The heat from a freshly toasted marshmallow will melt the chocolate slightly when sandwiched.

ingredients.name: Graham Crackers
ingredients.use: The outer shell — 2 crackers sandwich the chocolate and marshmallow
ingredients.prep: Break along the scored lines into rectangles. Pre-stack each s'more kit: 1 cracker + 1-2 chocolate squares on the bottom, top cracker ready to sandwich.
